headline: Is PAHC Undervalued at 10x Earnings vs Peers?
summary: Phibro trades near 10x forward earnings vs higher peer multiples as strong Q3 beat, margin gains and 2026 guidance support a modest upside case.

headline: Zoetis Inc (NYSE:ZTS) Offers a Winning Combination of Dividend Growth and Strong Fundamentals
summary: Discover Zoetis (ZTS), a Best Dividend screen pick with a 1.64% yield, 20.56% dividend growth, strong profitability (9/10), and a low 33.64% payout ratio for sustainable income.

headline: Zoetis Might Be Cheap For A Reason
summary: Zoetis (ZTS) is down ~70% and trades at low multiples. Weak U.S. Companion Animal segment prompted a downwardly revised 2026 outlook. See more here.
